meta.title: Alykul — Water Tourism on Issyk-Kul | Cruises, Charters, Adventures
meta.description: The first online booking platform for water transport on Lake Issyk-Kul. Cruises, private charters, speed tours and kids parties.

hero.subtitle: Book your water adventure on the largest alpine lake in Central Asia. Cholpon-Ata, Bosteri and the entire coastline.

usp.title: Why Alykul?
usp.subtitle: The first water tourism platform on Issyk-Kul — Cholpon-Ata, Bosteri and the entire coastline
usp.online_desc: Choose a route, date and pay online in 2 minutes
usp.fleet_desc: Every vessel is certified and inspected daily
usp.experience_desc: Over 5 years of organizing water tours on Issyk-Kul
usp.multilang_desc: Platform in Russian, Kyrgyz and English

schedule_section.title: Schedule
schedule_section.subtitle: Trips run from June 1 to September 15. Booking is open.

fleet_section.title: Our Fleet
fleet_section.subtitle: Certified vessels with daily inspection — from steamships to speedboats
fleet_section.alykul_desc: Fleet flagship. Cruises, corporate events, weddings, kids parties.
fleet_section.nomad_desc: Private charters, romantic trips, VIP service.
fleet_section.speedboats_desc: Adrenaline tours, water skiing, wakeboarding, fishing.

about_section.title: About Us
about_section.text_1: Alykul is the first digital booking operator for water transport on Lake Issyk-Kul. Based in Cholpon-Ata and Bosteri, we combine a certified fleet, experienced captains and modern technology to give every guest unforgettable impressions on the largest alpine lake in Central Asia.
about_section.text_2: Our flagship — the steamship «Alykul», accommodating up to 200 guests with a banquet hall, two decks and entertainment for the whole family.

footer.copyright: Alykul. All rights reserved. Lake Issyk-Kul, Kyrgyzstan.
